# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are assessed for the latest released version of `gly` and the current `master` branch. Older releases are not supported.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities in public issues, discussions, or pull requests.

Use [GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/2CHEVSKII/gly/security/advisories/new) to submit a confidential report. If that is unavailable, email [prsroman3@gmail.com](mailto:prsroman3@gmail.com) with the subject `gly security report`.

Include a clear description of the issue, affected version or commit, reproducible steps or proof of concept, impact assessment, and any suggested mitigation. Do not include secrets or sensitive personal data.

The maintainer will acknowledge receipt, investigate the report, and coordinate a fix and disclosure where appropriate.
